code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let parts = string.split_whitespace(input)

fn get_int(_ xs: List<String>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    match string.parse_int(s)
    when Some(n)
      n
    when None
      0
    end
  when None
    0
  end
end

let a = get_int(parts, 0)
let b = get_int(parts, 1)
let s = get_int(parts, 2)

mut out = ""
mut x = a
mut first = true
while x < b
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
  x = x + s
end
println(out)
